3295750.name: DEMON COMPASS
3295750.description:
"There is a piercing light that obscures your vision, you try to remember how you got here, but your memories are hazy and disjointed.

You feel a weight in your hand, and upon examining it, you find a cursed looking compass. It seems to be glowing in a certain direction, as if it’s guiding you towards something…"

DEMON COMPASS is a third person horror adventure game focused on exploration, light puzzle solving and abstract narration.

Navigate through three separate storylines, each with distinct characters, environments, and challenges.

Features :

  • Late 1990's 3D graphics style

  • Unlockable characters and Storylines

  • Unique Bossfights

  • A strange world to explore based on the PROVOKER universe
3295750.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
